attributes.name: format
attributes.description:
The format to use for the display value. If opacity is enabled, these will translate to HEXA, RGBA, HSLA, and HSVA
respectively. The color picker will always accept user input in any format (including CSS color names) and convert
it to the desired format.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Determines the size of the color picker's trigger. This has no effect on inline color pickers.

attributes.name: inline
attributes.description: Renders the color picker inline rather than inside a dropdown.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Sets the color picker to disabled.

attributes.name: opacity
attributes.description: Whether to show the opacity slider.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Sets the color picker to readonly mode.

attributes.name: uppercase
attributes.description: By default, the value will be set in lowercase. Set this to true to set it in uppercase instead.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

properties.name: format
properties.description:
The format to use for the display value. If opacity is enabled, these will translate to HEXA, RGBA, HSLA, and HSVA
respectively. The color picker will always accept user input in any format (including CSS color names) and convert
it to the desired format.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Determines the size of the color picker's trigger. This has no effect on inline color pickers.

properties.name: inline
properties.description: Renders the color picker inline rather than inside a dropdown.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Sets the color picker to disabled.

properties.name: opacity
properties.description: Whether to show the opacity slider.

properties.name: readonly
properties.description: Sets the color picker to readonly mode.

properties.name: uppercase
properties.description: By default, the value will be set in lowercase. Set this to true to set it in uppercase instead.

properties.name: swatches
properties.description:
An array of predefined color swatches to display. Can include any format the color picker can parse, including
HEX(A), RGB(A), HSL(A), HSV(A), and CSS color names.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label to be used for aria-label and potentially as visual label for some components

cssProperties.name: --uui-color-picker-width
cssProperties.description: The width of the color picker
